no: Installed (1 components). Added from WeiDU.log scan.
sum: Adds a flirtation and romance path for Garrick the bard in Baldur's Gate, allowing a female PC to explore 25 conversations with him during the BG1 portion of the saga.

co.no: mod_installer: game detection fails when installed pre-EET — GAME_IS eet (line 36) evaluates false before EET_Start, and eet/other/cpmvars/eet_cpmvars.tpa does not exist yet. tp2 does correctly handle EET; FAIL @104 only triggers if no supported game detected. Also: DLC Merger check at line 27 causes FAIL @116 if sod-dlc.zip present but unmerged. Fix: install after EET_Start on BG2EE executable (EET phase). BG1 content installed via EET merge.
